transcript: Speaker A: أنا أتعلم الإسبانية مجانًا على دوولينجو. [I learn Spanish for free on Duolingo.] ¡Me encanta la playa! [I love the beach!]
on_screen_text:
duolingo
أنا أتعلم الإسبانية مجانًا على دوولينجو. [I learn Spanish for free on Duolingo.]
¡Me encanta la playa! [I love the beach!]
summary: An animated bear on a beach shares that he learns Spanish for free on Duolingo. He demonstrates his skills by saying 'I love the beach!' in Spanish, promoting the app's language-learning capabilities.
